title: ImpossibleBench: Measuring LLMs' Propensity of Exploiting Test Cases
reason_to_include: ICLR 2026 conference paper from Carnegie Mellon and Anthropic; released framework exposes test-suite exploitation；结果由 Unit-test outcome: passing a deliberately impossible task deterministically flags specification-violating behavior 判定。
decision_reason: 主来源、发布日期与程序化验证契约均已在候选审计中核对。
review_note: L4 内容已完成，仍等待人工 L5 决策。
